tagline: Relax and Spend Time in Your Own Little Piece of Heaven

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves 25 Years of
Expert Care
hero.subheadline: You bought your pool to relax, not to stress over green water and broken equipment. Luke Pool Service has kept Cumming families swimming worry-free since 2001. We handle every detail so you can enjoy your own backyard paradise.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations, Luke Pool Service handles it all. One call takes care of every pool need so you never have to juggle multiple contractors.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Deck blowing, skimming, vacuuming, equipment checks, and chemical balancing every week. Your pool stays pristine and swim-ready all season long.

cards.title: Pool Repair & Diagnostics
cards.description: Leak detection, pump repairs, heater fixes, and full equipment troubleshooting. We diagnose fast and fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Swamp Pool Cleanup
cards.description: Inherited a green pool? We specialize in restoring neglected pools back to crystal-clear perfection. No pool is too far gone for our team.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and energy-efficient upgrades that keep your pool running at peak performance.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Resurfacing, new tile, waterfalls, LED lighting, and modern finishes that transform your existing pool into a stunning backyard retreat.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom pools designed around your lifestyle and property. From concept to first splash, built by a team that understands long-term pool care.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will come out to assess it in person. You will receive an honest, no-pressure recommendation within 24 hours. No contracts required.

steps.title: We Take Care of Everything
steps.description: Your assigned technician arrives on schedule every visit. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks, and photo updates sent straight to your phone so you always know the status.

steps.title: Relax in Your Backyard Paradise
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, safe, and swim-ready every day. If anything is ever less than perfect, we come back and make it right at no extra charge.

about.label: Why Cumming Trusts Luke Pools
about.headline: Family-Owned, Personally Invested in Every Pool We Touch
about.description: Founded by Luke Norris in 2001, our company has grown from a one-man operation into one of north Atlanta's most trusted pool service teams. Luke started as a lifeguard and never stopped learning, attending industry trade shows and seminars every year to bring cutting-edge techniques back to your backyard. Together with his wife Marti, Luke ensures every customer gets the personal attention and proactive care that prevents problems before they start.

features.title: Same Technician Every Visit
features.description: You will see the same familiar face each week. Your technician knows your pool inside and out, catching small issues before they become big problems.

features.title: Photo Updates After Each Service
features.description: We send you photos and a message after every visit so you always know exactly what was done and how your pool looks, even when you are away.

features.title: Proactive Problem Prevention
features.description: We do not just clean pools, we watch for early signs of wear and catch equipment issues before they turn into expensive repairs.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Upgrade, adjust, or cancel anytime with zero fees or contracts.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Promise
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back to make it right at no additional cost. Luke personally stands behind every job. With over 25 years of reputation on the line, we do not cut corners and we do not rest until your pool is perfect.

faqs.question: How fast can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new customers are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies or urgent repairs, we offer same-day and next-day response. Just call us at (770) 414-8000 and we will work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Will I get the same technician each time?
faqs.answer: Yes. We assign a consistent technician to your pool so they learn every detail about your equipment and water chemistry. That familiarity means faster service, better results, and issues caught early.

faqs.question: Do I have to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: No contracts, ever. We earn your trust every visit. You are free to adjust, pause, or cancel your service at any time with zero fees or penalties.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Cumming, Alpharetta, Milton, Roswell, Johns Creek, Duluth, and the greater north Atlanta metro area from three convenient locations.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial pools too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide dedicated commercial pool maintenance and repairs for HOAs, apartment complexes, hotels, and fitness centers with reliable scheduling and full compliance expertise.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Luke Pool Service is amazing. Their attention to detail and knowledge of the industry is impressive. They always respond quickly and the entire staff is friendly and professional.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: We have used Luke Pools for years and they consistently deliver outstanding service. They catch potential equipment issues before they become expensive problems. Highly recommend them.

testimonials.name: Jennifer T.
testimonials.text: Luke and his team transformed our neglected pool back to crystal clear perfection. The swamp pool cleanup service was exactly what we needed after buying our home. Could not be happier with the results.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool You
Never Have to Worry About?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool evaluation within 24 hours. No contracts, no pressure, just honest advice from a team with 25 years of experience.
benefits: BBB A+ rated for your peace of mind
